description_long: This is a handheld electric drill with a robust, angular body primarily colored in blue with black and metallic gray accents. The drill features a pistol-grip handle, a trigger area, and a prominent cylindrical chuck holding a long, straight drill bit. The body shows signs of wear, with visible scuff marks and scratches, suggesting frequent use in urban or workshop environments. Ventilation slots are present on the lower part of the body, likely for cooling the internal motor. The drill's design is ergonomic, with a wide base for stability when set down and a textured grip for secure handling.
description: A blue and black handheld electric drill with a long drill bit, ergonomic grip, and visible wear marks, designed for urban or workshop use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the drill, including the handle, trigger area, and extended drill bit.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular chuck and the tip of the drill bit, with the handle and base aligned behind.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other profile of the drill, including the handle, trigger, and drill bit.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the handle and the alignment of the drill bit extending forward.
